title: styphelia malayana subsp. malayana
intro: Styphelia malayana subsp. malayana is a plant species that belongs to the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the heath family. It is native to Malaysia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, sore throat, and skin infections, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Styphelia malayana subsp. malayana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, although other preparations may also be used.
